## Title: Add bounds check for dl_BandwidthP parameter in config_mib

### Summary
The `config_mib` function in the MAC layer uses the `dl_BandwidthP` parameter as an array index in downstream operations without validating its range. Invalid values outside the expected range of 0-5 can cause out-of-bounds memory access, leading to undefined behavior, potential crashes, or silent data corruption. I add an `AssertFatal` check at the function entry to validate the parameter bounds, ensuring early fa
